units: native reporting currency, millions (see per-company ccy; EPS per share, margins %)
note: Quarterly = direct BBG kFQ consensus. CY = calendar-year sum on a uniform non-GAAP basis: forecast quarters use kFQ consensus, and reported quarters use the BBG comparable/adjusted actual via a past fiscal-period override (NOT the GAAP bdh actual, which would mix bases and understate adjusted EPS/NI); fiscal quarters snapped to nearest calendar quarter. Street-high: _HI fields (capex _LO=high spend), outlier-guarded; CY street-high = sum of quarterly highs. OCF/capex/FCF = latest reported FY actual (no forward OCF consensus on wrapper). ccy = fundamentals currency (ADRs report native: TM ¥, TSM NT$, ASML/IFX €).
